name: voice
author: octos
description: OminiX voice skill: ASR, TTS, and model management via local Qwen3 models on Apple Silicon

tools.name: voice_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using Qwen3-ASR (POST /v1/audio/asr/qwen3). Supports WAV, OGG, MP3, FLAC, M4A. Use this when you receive a voice message or need to extract text from audio. Returns the transcribed text.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: voice_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text using Qwen3-TTS (POST /v1/audio/tts/qwen3). Produces a WAV audio file. Use this when the user asks for a voice reply or text-to-speech. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/octos_tts_<timestamp>.wav

speaker.description: Voice name: a preset ('vivian', 'serena', 'ryan', 'aiden', 'eric', 'dylan', 'uncle_fu', 'ono_anna', 'sohee') OR a saved voice profile name. Use voice_list_profiles to see saved profiles.

tools.name: voice_clone
tools.description: Clone a voice from a reference audio sample (3-10 seconds) and synthesize new speech in that voice via POST /v1/audio/tts/clone. Uses ECAPA-TDNN x-vector speaker embedding. Requires the Base TTS model (not CustomVoice). After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio. IMPORTANT: When the user sends a voice sample for cloning, always ask what name they want for this voice profile, then set save_as to save it for future use.

reference_audio.description: Absolute path to reference audio file (3-10 seconds, WAV/OGG/MP3/FLAC/M4A). The voice in this clip will be cloned.

text.description: The text to synthesize in the cloned voice

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/octos_clone_<timestamp>.wav

save_as.description: Save this voice as a named profile for future use. The name can then be used as speaker in voice_synthesize.

tools.name: voice_save_profile
tools.description: Save an audio sample as a named voice profile for future TTS cloning. The saved profile can then be used as the speaker parameter in voice_synthesize. Profiles are private to this user/profile.

name.description: Name for this voice profile (e.g. 'alice', 'my_voice', 'boss'). Lowercase alphanumeric + underscore/hyphen.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the reference audio file (3-10 seconds)

tools.name: voice_list_profiles
tools.description: List all saved voice profiles for this user. Shows profile names that can be used as the speaker parameter in voice_synthesize.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all loaded models and available models in the catalog on the local ominix-api server. Use this to check which ASR/TTS/LLM models are installed and which can be downloaded.

tools.name: download_model
tools.description: Download a model from the catalog to the local machine. Use list_models first to see available model IDs. Downloads can take several minutes for large models.

tools.name: load_model
tools.description: Load a downloaded model into GPU memory for inference. The model must already be downloaded locally.

model.description: Model name or path to load

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload a model from GPU memory to free resources.
